metadata.instruction: Open Task ID 44.xlsx in Documents > Task 44 folder, calculate the average of "# Days to finish" using mathematical functions available in Excel.
metadata.context: I am tracking all the books I've read in an excel sheet. I have columns for "Book Title", "# Days to Finish", and "Rating (1-10)". I want to know how many days I took to read a book on average.
